response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including embedded systems (e.g., C/C++ at National Instruments), but lacks direct experience with embedded networking, Linux kernel modifications, and security technologies like MACsec or IEEE 802.1X. While their C/C++ proficiency is strong, their resume does not highlight networking, security, or embedded firmware development, which are critical for this role. Their Japanese language proficiency is also unconfirmed.
strengths: Strong C/C++ experience from embedded systems work (National Instruments)
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies and domains
Extensive software development experience across full-stack, embedded, and real-time systems
concerns: No explicit experience with Linux kernel modifications or embedded networking
No demonstrated experience with security technologies (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, etc.)
Unconfirmed native-level Japanese proficiency and limited exposure to Japanese-speaking environments
